---
type: claim
genitor: "[[claims]]"
date: 2026-07-12
domain: workshop
supports:
  - "[[Execution beats review for validating a guard]]"
  - "[[When is a checklist better than automation]]"
---
A guard that had been reviewed and approved turned out never to fire. Nobody had run it
against a deliberately-broken input, so nothing distinguished a check that always passes
from a check that never runs.
